hypothesis: Augmenting LoQI with coarse-grained protein-pocket conditioning (3D shape and electrostatic grids around the binding site) will enable single-shot generation of ligand conformers within 1.0 Å heavy-atom RMSD of the crystallographic bound pose for at least 60% of ligands in the Platinum Diverse set using no more than five samples per ligand, outperforming RDKit ETKDG and unconditioned LoQI under the same sampling budget.
